mapper.select:
SELECT id, pressure_device, pressure_tag, pressure_location, pressure_equip, pressure_model, pressure_manu, pressure_range, pressure_connection, pressure_accuracy, pressure_power, pressure_output, pressure_heat, pressure_interlock, pressure_interlock_val, pressure_remark FROM pressure_instrument
AND pressure_tag LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.pressureTag},'%')
AND pressure_device LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.pressureDevice},'%')

SELECT id, pressure_device, pressure_tag, pressure_location, pressure_equip, pressure_model, pressure_manu, pressure_range, pressure_connection, pressure_accuracy, pressure_power, pressure_output, pressure_heat, pressure_interlock, pressure_interlock_val, pressure_remark FROM pressure_instrument
AND pressure_tag LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pressureTag},'%')
AND pressure_device LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pressureDevice},'%')
